headline: CYVIATION Partners with Boeing on New SkyGuard Service
summary: Boeing's Aviation Business Solutions to offer CYVIATION's SkyRay™ platform as part of its newly launched SkyGuard service, helping operators meet rising cyber and regulatory demandsNEW YORK and TEL AVIV, Israel, June 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CYVIATION, the cybersecurity company purpose-built for aviation, today announced its strategic partnership with Boeing on the company's newly launched SkyGuard service, deepening a relationship that brings continuous, aircraft cyber risk visibility to ai
